channel.title: Projects on Muhammad Qasim
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Muhammad Qasim

item.title: DevShelf — Search Engine from First Principles (Java)
item.description: DevShelf is a distributed vertical search engine for Computer Science literature, engineered in Java without Lucene or ElasticSearch.

item.title: MQNotebook — Enterprise-Grade RAG System
item.description: MQNotebook is a production-ready Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine designed for messy, real-world enterprise documents.

item.title: Foldr — File Organizer CLI
item.description: A Python CLI tool for organizing files with undo, dry-run, and automation support.

item.title: BabyGPT: Generative Text Engine
item.description: A character-level Generative AI model built from scratch using Dual-Stack LSTMs and custom temperature sampling.
